# EKCalendarChooserSelectionStyle.multiple

**Case**

A style that lets users select multiple calendars.

## Declaration

```swift
case multiple
```

## Constants

- **EKCalendarChooserSelectionStyle.single**: A style that limits users to selecting a single calendar.

items.description: A style that limits users to selecting a single calendar.
